message:
fix(trace): Add missing compression byte read in verification/compat

The trace file format includes a compression byte after the flags field,
but verify_header in integrity.rs and CompatReader::open in compat.rs
were not reading this byte, causing file position misalignment and
"failed to read metadata" errors.

Fixes:
- Add compression byte read in verify_header()
- Add compression byte read in CompatReader::open()
- Add compression byte write in compat test manual file construction
- Fix disk_full_is_handled test to flush buffer before asserting ENOSPC

This resolves 10 failing trace tests:
- trace::integrity::tests::* (all)
- trace::compat::tests::compat_reader_reads_valid_trace
- trace::compat::tests::compat_reader_skips_unknown_events
- trace::compat::tests::compat_reader_read_event_compat_returns_skipped_info
- trace::file::tests::disk_full_is_handled

Closes: bd-3yff

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
